detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use wdttb driver.

sect1.title: xwdttb_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the driver.

sect1.title: xwdttb_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver functions.

sect1.title: xwdttb_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xwdttb_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low-level driver macros of the driver.

sect1.title: xwdttb_winwdt_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver with window feature.

sect1.title: xwdttb_winwdt_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver with window feature for interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xwdttb_gwdt_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver with Generic WDT feature.

sect1.title: xwdttb_gwdt_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the driver.

sect1.title: xwdttb_gwdt_intr_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XWdttb driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver with Generic WDT feature for interrupt mode.

NOTE:- More information on examples for each IP. WWDT:- -xwdttb_gwdt_selftest_example.c -xwdttb_gwdt_example.c -xwdttb_gwdt_intr_example.c -xwdttb_selftest_example.c -xwdttb_winwdt_example.c -xwdttb_winwdt_intr_example.c -Above examples works for WWDT driver. AXI TIMEBASE:- Case 1:-(Timebase WDT) -xwdttb_selftest_example.c -xwdttb_example.c -xwdttb_intr_example.c Case 2:-(Window watchdog) -xwdttb_selftest_example.c -xwdttb_winwdt_example.c -xwdttb_winwdt_intr_example.c -Above examples works for AXI Timebase WDT.
